events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes fireblocking/draftstopping work where foam was used where fire-rated sealant was required (identified by color/label). This is a non-compliant condition. IRC R302 requires fireblocking to resist the passage of flame and gases; using non-fire-rated foam where fire-rated sealant is required is a defect.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (fire safety)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 90
Confidence: high
Findings: non-fire-rated foam used where fire-rated sealant required
Actions: remove foam, install approved fire-rated sealant
References: IRC R302
